name: Changjiang & Jinggong Steel Building (Group) Co., Ltd
summary: Changjiang & Jinggong Steel Building (Group) Co., Ltd. engages in the design, construction, and installation of steel structures in China and internationally. The company offers light and high-rise steel structures, metal building systems, steel decking, and cladding products. It also provides new building materials. The company was founded in 1999 and is headquartered in Shanghai, China.
